rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope only when binding implementation-level outputs or subcomponent variables.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by placing contracts in the scope (type or implementation) that matches the visibility of referenced features.
Only reference features or variables explicitly exposed in the target scope; avoid subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and contain only declarations or claims valid in the enclosing AADL scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables; they are not in scope unless explicitly bound as ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
